evidence_policy: Official Elementor capability does not prove project-specific use. Builder-ready strategy still requires CE evidence for the specific node, class, control path, binding, asset, geometry, or QA claim.

records.version_scope: Elementor developer documentation current at verification date
records.constructability_use: Can support spacing, padding, margin, and dimensional strategy claims when paired with exact control evidence.
records.evidence_required_before_builder: Exact node/control reference, value/unit, responsive scope, and proof that the control path exists in the target Elementor version.
records.known_limitations: Does not prove project-specific geometry or exact UI path by itself.

records.version_scope: Elementor developer documentation current at verification date
records.constructability_use: Can support size, spacing, width, z-index-like numeric strategy only when the exact control and selector are evidenced.
records.evidence_required_before_builder: Control name, unit, range, selector, node target, and exact UI-control evidence if user-facing path is claimed.
records.known_limitations: A generic slider capability does not identify a specific Elementor UI path or prove safe values.

records.version_scope: Elementor developer documentation current at verification date
records.constructability_use: Can support device-specific strategy records for desktop/tablet/mobile controls.
records.evidence_required_before_builder: Breakpoint/device scope, inherited/default values, target selector, and confirmation that no unresolved responsive decision remains.
records.known_limitations: Does not prove custom breakpoints, inheritance safety, or responsive completion for this project.

records.official_name: Responsive editing for mobile and tablets
records.version_scope: Elementor help documentation current at verification date
records.constructability_use: Can support the existence of responsive editing workflow, not any specific responsive result.
records.evidence_required_before_builder: Target breakpoint, actual responsive settings, and CE proof that Builder has no remaining responsive strategy decision.
records.known_limitations: Does not claim Responsive Architect acceptance or production readiness.

records.version_scope: Elementor developer documentation current at verification date
records.constructability_use: Can support dynamic-data strategy only when data source, tag, and binding map are explicit.
records.evidence_required_before_builder: Dynamic Loop or Dynamic Tag binding map, data source, exact target control, and plugin/version availability evidence.
records.known_limitations: Documentation states active dynamic tags are an Elementor Pro feature; CE must not infer availability in a target site without evidence.

records.version_scope: Requires versioned official Elementor V4 documentation or controlled real fixture before Builder authorization.
records.constructability_use: May be discussed as a required capability area, but cannot authorize Builder execution from this registry alone.
records.evidence_required_before_builder: Official V4 source or controlled real Elementor evidence for each exact class, component, variable, interaction, or atomic-element claim.
records.known_limitations: This record intentionally blocks claims not verified by official source in this patch.

records.official_name: Custom breakpoints, Widescreen behavior, and V3/V4 hybrid behavior
records.version_scope: Requires current official help/developer documentation or controlled real fixture.
records.constructability_use: Blocks exact breakpoint inheritance or V3/V4 hybrid claims unless source evidence is attached.
records.evidence_required_before_builder: Versioned official documentation or real captured setting path and behavior evidence.
records.known_limitations: No Builder package may rely on this without additional evidence.

records.official_name: Logical properties and RTL implementation strategy
records.version_scope: Requires Elementor-specific official or controlled real evidence for exact UI controls and generated CSS.
records.constructability_use: Can be marked as required evidence for RTL-sensitive layouts but not Builder-ready without proof.
records.evidence_required_before_builder: Exact Elementor control, generated CSS, RTL rendering evidence, and responsive scope.
records.known_limitations: General CSS knowledge is not enough for a CE Builder-ready claim.
